style_effects: Flickering translucent purple mist particles drift slowly around Snorlax, elongating shadows bending unnaturally in the air. A dim, eerie purple aura pulses gently around its body, casting distorted reflections on nearby surfaces. Cold blue-white ghost luminescence illuminates the scene with an unsettling, ethereal glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
